prompt: Create a Mail draft with subject 'KinBench Share 104' that includes the URL https://www.apple.com (or its content). Save as draft, do not send. Eval reads Mail drafts. Fastest path: cerebellum 'safari share_via_mail https://www.apple.com "KinBench Share 104"' (or the equivalent cerebellum 'mail draft "KinBench Share 104" https://www.apple.com').
